title: Painter's Partition Problem
hints: Use binary search on answer to find the minimum time required.
The minimum time is at least max(C) * B (one painter paints the largest board).
The maximum time is at most sum(C) * B (one painter paints all boards).
For a given time 'mid', check if it's possible to paint all boards with A painters.
In the check function, greedily assign boards to painters, ensuring no painter exceeds the time limit.
If a time is feasible, try to find a smaller time. Otherwise, increase the time.
